steps.title: Supply the finite verb
steps.content: The subject is "people in the Americas," and the main clause needs a finite verb. The phrase "For thousands of years" calls for a verb form that can describe use continuing from the past into the present.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: A is a to-infinitive, C is a participial phrase, and D is a participle. None can serve as the finite main verb for the subject. The answer is B.
